# JaviPhoto - Javier Fernández Ramos

Professional photographer based in Valencia, Spain. Specializing in high-performance sports photography, professional portraits, corporate events, and personal branding.

## Professional Services
- **Sports Photography**: High-speed action shots, competition coverage (Motorsports, Tennis, Athletics).
- **Professional Portraits**: Clean, high-quality portraits for personal and professional use.
- **Event Coverage**: Corporate and social events documentation with a technical and elegant vision.
- **Brand Identity**: Visual content for entrepreneurs and companies to communicate value.

## Portfolio & Navigation
- [Gallery](https://javierfernandezramos.github.io/galeria): Featured collections (Model, Events, Sports, Brand).
- [Videos](https://javierfernandezramos.github.io/videos): Dynamic highlights and cinematic storytelling.
- [Contact](https://javierfernandezramos.github.io/contacto): Booking and personalized quotes.

## Geographic Focus
Primary service area is **Valencia, Spain**, with availability for national and international travel.

## Online Presence
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/javier.fzr/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@javier.fzr
- Website: https://javierfernandezramos.github.io/
